name: Shadow IT Application Detection
description: Identifies unauthorized shadow IT applications running on managed endpoints. When an unknown application is detected, the playbook classifies it against the approved software catalog and risk database. High-risk shadow IT (file sharing, VPN tunneling, remote access) triggers an approval gate before enforcement. If blocked, the application is removed and the user is notified. Low-risk applications are flagged for IT governance review.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: CrowdStrike Falcon
required_integrations.reason: Discover running applications and enforce removal of unauthorized software

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create governance review tickets and policy violation records

config.description: Triggers when an unknown or unauthorized application is discovered running on a managed endpoint

config.code:
app_name = alert.get('application_name', '').lower()
app_category = alert.get('application_category', 'unknown')
high_risk_categories = ['file_sharing', 'vpn_tunnel', 'remote_access', 'crypto_mining', 'anonymizer', 'p2p']
high_risk_apps = ['dropbox', 'wetransfer', 'mega', 'tunnelbear', 'windscribe', 'anydesk', 'teamviewer', 'ultraviewer', 'rustdesk', 'parsec']
is_high_risk = app_category in high_risk_categories or any(a in app_name for a in high_risk_apps)
result = {'app_name': alert.get('application_name'), 'category': app_category, 'is_high_risk': is_high_risk, 'risk_level': 'high' if is_high_risk else 'low', 'user': alert.get('username', 'unknown')}
config.description: Classify the shadow IT application against high-risk categories (file sharing, VPN, remote access, crypto mining)
Routes based on whether the shadow IT application falls into a high-risk category
Require analyst approval before enforcing removal of high-risk shadow IT applications
Remove the unauthorized shadow IT application from the endpoint

parameters.title: Shadow IT Removed: {{code_1.app_name}} — {{trigger_1.alert.hostname}}

config.description: Create a policy violation ticket and notify the user about the removal

parameters.note: Low-risk shadow IT detected on {{trigger_1.alert.hostname}}: {{code_1.app_name}} (Category: {{code_1.category}}). User: {{code_1.user}}. Flagged for IT governance review.

config.description: Flag the low-risk shadow IT application for IT governance review without enforcement
Shadow IT application detection workflow complete
